creator: andreast@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 197525
Netboot 2018-09-24

The Lua Loader does not work on powerpc/powerpc64. Both powerpc architectures share the same loader binary.

The first attached picture shows an error when net booting the powerpc (PowerMac in this case)

The second picture shows an error when booting from disk back on the 24.8

The third picture shows an error when booting from disk on the 23.9.

I hope the naming of the attachment is self speaking.
